2603.14575.title: CausalEvolve: Towards Open-Ended Discovery with Causal Scratchpad
2603.14575.paper_summary: Evolve-based agent such as AlphaEvolve is one of the notable successes in using Large Language Models (LLMs) to build AI Scientists. These agents tackle open-ended scientific problems by iteratively improving and evolving programs, leveraging the prior knowledge and reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Despite the success, existing evolve-based agents lack targeted guidance for evolution and effective mechanisms for organizing and utilizing knowledge acquired from past evolutionary experience. Consequently, they suffer from decreasing evolution efficiency and exhibit oscillatory behavior when approaching known performance boundaries. To mitigate the gap, we develop CausalEvolve, equipped with a causal scratchpad that leverages LLMs to identify and reason about guiding factors for evolution. At the beginning, CausalEvolve first identifies outcome-level factors that offer complementary inspirations in improving the target objective. During the evolution, CausalEvolve also inspects surprise patterns during the evolution and abductive reasoning to hypothesize new factors, which in turn offer novel directions. Through comprehensive experiments, we show that CausalEvolve effectively improves the evolutionary efficiency and discovers better solutions in 4 challenging open-ended scientific tasks.
2603.14575.paper_summary_zh: Evolve-based agent such as AlphaEvolve 是利用大型語言模型（LLMs）建立 AI 科學家的顯著成功之一。這些代理透過迭代改進和演化程序來解決開放式科學問題，利用 LLMs 的先前知識和推理能力。儘管取得了成功，現有的基於演化的代理缺乏針對演化的具體指導和有效的機制來組織和利用從過去演化經驗中獲得的知識。因此，它們在接近已知性能邊界時，演化效率下降並顯示出振盪行為。為了彌補這一差距，我們開發了 CausalEvolve，配備了一個因果草稿板，利用 LLMs 來識別和推理演化的指導因素。一開始，CausalEvolve 首先識別出提供補充靈感的結果層級因素，以改進目標目標。在演化過程中，CausalEvolve 還檢查演化過程中的驚訝模式和溯因推理，以假設新因素，這反過來又提供了新方向。通過全面的實驗，我們顯示 CausalEvolve 有效提高了演化效率，並在 4 個具有挑戰性的開放式科學任務中發現了更好的解決方案。
2603.14575.author: Yongqiang Chen et.al.
2603.14575.authors: Yongqiang Chen, Chenxi Liu, Zhenhao Chen, Tongliang Liu, Bo Han, Kun Zhang
